mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(vc.id) FROM hxds_vhr.tb_voucher_customer vc WHERE vc.customer_id = #{customerId} AND vc.status = 0

SELECT v.discount, v.with_amount AS withAmount, v.remark, v.time_type AS timeType, v.days, DATE_FORMAT(vc.start_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(vc.end_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS endTime, DATE_FORMAT(vc.create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS createTime FROM hxds_vhr.tb_voucher_customer vc JOIN hxds_vhr.tb_voucher v ON vc.voucher_id = v.id WHERE vc.customer_id = #{customerId} AND vc.status = 0 ORDER BY vc.id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{length}
SELECT COUNT(vc.id) FROM hxds_vhr.tb_voucher_customer vc WHERE vc.customer_id = #{customerId} AND vc.status = 0

SELECT v.discount, v.with_amount AS withAmount, v.remark, v.time_type AS timeType, v.days, DATE_FORMAT(vc.start_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(vc.end_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS endTime, DATE_FORMAT(vc.create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS createTime FROM hxds_vhr.tb_voucher_customer vc JOIN hxds_vhr.tb_voucher v ON vc.voucher_id = v.id WHERE vc.customer_id = #{customerId} AND vc.status = 1 ORDER BY vc.id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{length}
SELECT COUNT(vc.id) FROM hxds_vhr.tb_voucher_customer vc WHERE vc.customer_id = #{customerId} AND vc.status = 1

SELECT v.id, v.uuid, v.discount, v.with_amount AS withAmount, v.remark, v.time_type AS timeType, v.days, DATE_FORMAT(v.start_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(v.end_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS endTime, DATE_FORMAT(v.create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') AS createTime FROM hxds_vhr.tb_voucher v WHERE v.status = 1 AND v.take_count < v.total_quota AND v.id NOT IN ( SELECT voucher_id FROM hxds_vhr.tb_voucher_customer WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ) AND (v.end_time IS NULL OR v.end_time > NOW()) ORDER BY v.id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{length}

SELECT COUNT(v.id) FROM hxds_vhr.tb_voucher v WHERE v.status = 1 AND v.take_count < v.total_quota AND v.id NOT IN ( SELECT voucher_id FROM hxds_vhr.tb_voucher_customer WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ) AND (v.end_time IS NULL OR v.end_time > NOW())
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hxds_vhr.tb_voucher_customer (customer_id, voucher_id, status, start_time, end_time) SELECT #{customerId}, v.id, 0, CASE WHEN v.time_type = 2 THEN v.start_time ELSE NOW() END, CASE WHEN v.time_type = 1 THEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL v.days DAY) WHEN v.time_type = 2 THEN v.end_time ELSE NULL END FROM hxds_vhr.tb_voucher v WHERE v.id = #{id} AND v.uuid = #{uuid} AND v.status = 1 AND v.take_count < v.total_quota AND v.id NOT IN ( SELECT voucher_id FROM hxds_vhr.tb_voucher_customer WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} )
